subject: Renew your subscription to avoid any delay on your service
body:
Your account is on hold.

Update your payment Method

Dear costumer,

We're having some trouble with your current billing information. We'll try again, but in the meantime you may want to update your payment details.

UPDATE NOW

–Your friends at Netflix

This account email has been sent to you as part of your Netflix membership. To change your email preferences at any time, please visit the Communication Settings page for your account.

Please do not reply to this email, as we are unable to respond from this email address. If you need help or would like to contact us, please visit our Help Center at help.netflix.com .

This message was mailed by Netflix.

SRC: 12687_en_CH

Use of the Netflix service and website is subject to our Privacy Statement .

Netflix International B.V.

subject: Netflix : Renew your subscription to avoid any delay on your service
body:
Dear jose@monkey.org,

Please note that, your monthly payment has been failed.

Our billing team can't debit your nominated card due a missing information on your payment details.

Verify your details again to avoid any delay on your service.

Renew your subscription by clicking on the link below.

https://netflix.com/update/account/info

Netflix support

Dear jose@monkey.org, Please note that, your monthly payment has been failed. Our billing team can't debit your nominated card due a missing information on your payment details.
